FFmpeg source/license provenance

- FFmpeg upstream source repository: https://github.com/FFmpeg/FFmpeg
- Copied LGPL text file source: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/FFmpeg/FFmpeg/master/COPYING.LGPLv2.1
- Binary build source used by Windows fetch script: https://github.com/BtbN/FFmpeg-Builds
- Binary build source license file: ffmpeg-builds-LICENSE.txt (MIT)
- Windows fetch script: ENGINE/build/download-ffmpeg-lgpl-win-x64.ps1

macOS arm64 source-build reference pinning:

- Workflow reference with pinned build command: ENGINE/.github/workflows/macos-arm64.yml
- Pinned FFmpeg tag: n8.0.1
- Pinned FFmpeg commit: d22ecc4f6f3fca77b3e71b18641ceddb25973e97
- Upstream pinned tag URL: https://github.com/FFmpeg/FFmpeg/tree/n8.0.1
- Upstream pinned commit URL: https://github.com/FFmpeg/FFmpeg/commit/d22ecc4f6f3fca77b3e71b18641ceddb25973e97
